empty.noLeads: No leads in the last 30 days.
No open leads assigned to you.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Generated documents are stored and evented.
reports.chainBadge: Nightly event hash-chain check: {status} · last verified {when}

evidenceCard.title: Commission evidence report
evidenceCard.description: Chronological, hash-verified activity record for a contact — viewings with signed slips, offers, stage changes — as a stored PDF.

list.heading: Generated reports
list.empty: No generated reports visible to you yet — build one from the commission evidence report above.

verify.heading: Verify a report
verify.description: Upload a generated PDF (or paste its SHA-256) to check it against the append-only event log. A match proves the file is byte-identical to what was generated. You can verify reports whose generation event is visible to you.
verify.matched: Authentic — this exact file was generated on {when} ({count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}}).
verify.matchedNoCount: Authentic — this exact file was generated on {when}.
verify.noMatch: No match — no report with this SHA-256 is recorded in the event log visible to you. The file may have been altered, or its generation event may not be yours to see.

errors.noInput: Choose a PDF file or paste its SHA-256.
errors.notAHash: That doesn't contain a SHA-256 digest (64 hex characters).

evidence.title: Commission evidence
evidence.subtitle: Pick a contact, preview the chronological record, then generate the stored PDF.
evidence.stored: Stored ({count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} · chain {status}).
evidence.previewBanner: Preview — the hash chain is verified when the PDF is generated. {count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} · report hash {hash}
evidence.previewBannerWithCheck: Preview — the hash chain is verified when the PDF is generated (nightly check: {status}, {when}). {count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} · report hash {hash}
evidence.scopeNote: Scope: events visible to you — other staff or system activity may be absent.
evidence.truncated: This preview is incomplete — one event category hit its cap. Narrow the date range; generation is refused until the record fits.

errors.noEvents: No events found for this contact and filter.
errors.truncated: The record exceeds {max} events in one category — an incomplete report will not be generated. Narrow the date range and try again.
errors.rolledBack: Report rolled back — its event could not be written: {message}
errors.dealNotFound: Deal not found for this contact (or not visible to you)
